docs.name: Glow Hero Section
docs.description: Physics-driven hero section with an interactive aqueous mesh canvas, spring-based motion text entrance, and fully configurable badge, heading, description, colors, and dimensions.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra CSS classes applied to the root container.

props.name: height
props.description: Tailwind height class for the component, e.g. "h-screen" or "h-[600px]".

props.name: badge
props.description: Text shown in the badge above the heading. Pass null to hide the badge entirely.

props.name: description
props.description: Subheading / description paragraph beneath the heading.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: CSS background color of the container behind the mesh canvas.

props.name: meshColorStart
props.description: Start color of the linear gradient applied to mesh lines.

props.name: meshColorEnd
props.description: End color of the linear gradient applied to mesh lines.

props.name: meshOpacity
props.description: Overall opacity of the mesh canvas layer (0–1).

props.name: gridSize
props.description: Pixel size of each mesh grid cell. Smaller = denser mesh.

props.name: mouseRadius
props.description: Radius in pixels within which mouse movement repels mesh grid points.

variants.label: Default
Dark Theme
No Badge

docs.overview: GlowHeroSection is a full-width hero component with a customizable radial glow effect behind the content. It combines a gradient background, centered text hierarchy, and optional CTA buttons into one production-ready section.

scenarios.title: SaaS product landing hero
scenarios.description: The most common pattern — headline, subheadline, and two CTA buttons over a dark glowing background.

scenarios.title: Open-source project hero
scenarios.description: Show contributor count and GitHub stars as social proof badges inside the glow hero.
